NCCN Guidelines Version 3.2026
Acute Myeloid Leukemia

Discussion
This discussion corresponds to the NCCN Guidelines for Acute Myeloid Leukemia. Last updated November 24, 2025.

Table of Contents

Ove

Overview

Acute myeloid leukemia (AML) is a heterogeneous hematologic malignancy characterized by the clonal expansion of myeloid blasts in the peripheral blood, bone marrow (BM), and/or other tissues
